title: Top Ten Orders
description: Welcome to Rank Challenge. Show the ten biggest orders. Return `id` and `total` from `orders`, sorted by `total` from highest to lowest, and limited to 10 rows.
hints: ORDER BY total DESC sorts from largest to smallest.
LIMIT 10 keeps only the first ten rows.

files.content:
-- TODO: show only the ten largest orders, biggest first
SELECT id, total FROM orders;

parseRules.failMessage: Sort the rows with ORDER BY.
Sort from highest to lowest with DESC.
Keep only ten rows with LIMIT.
